description: Configure the OpenBCI GUI for a single-channel EMG control scenario using the pre-recorded motor imagery data 'OpenBCI-EEG-S001-MotorImagery.txt' from the Recordings folder. Set up an EMG widget that isolates Channel 1 (disabling Channels 2-8) to simulate a muscle switch while ignoring background activity on other channels. Ensure the EMG threshold is adjusted above the noise floor to prevent false triggers.
